tasks.title: Replace Hurl with Vitest e2e tests
tasks.notes: Switched to Hono app.request() for in-process e2e tests. Test DB created via drizzle-kit push in globalSetup. refs ADR-004.

tasks.title: Add JSDoc enforcement across codebase
tasks.notes: Added JSDoc to all existing files. Created PostToolUse hook (.claude/scripts/check-jsdoc.sh) to flag missing JSDoc on future edits.

subtasks.name: Add JSDoc to all existing .ts files

tasks.title: Slim CLAUDE.md with path-scoped rules
tasks.notes: Moved duplicated/hook-enforced rules to .claude/rules/ with paths frontmatter. Created code-style.md. CLAUDE.md 54→40 lines.

tasks.title: Set up progress tracking with sprint archive
tasks.notes: Migrate from root progress.json to progress/current.json + archive/. Add task management rules to CLAUDE.md. refs ADR-005.

tasks.title: Create project-level /commit skill
tasks.notes: Replace built-in /commit with project-specific skill. Runs /verify, auto-generates commit message per commit-message.md rules, refs active TASK-XXX. Plan: progress/features/commit-skill.md
